insight.headline: Deprecating useBuyerJourneyIntercept
insight.what_changed: The useBuyerJourneyIntercept API on checkout UI extensions is deprecated starting in version 2026-07. The block_progress capability it depends on is also deprecated. Existing extensions will continue to work on older versions but should be updated to ensure compatibility with future versions.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should review their checkout UI extensions and update them to remove the useBuyerJourneyIntercept hook and block_progress capability. They should also test their extensions with the latest API version to ensure compatibility. The deprecation of this API may require significant changes to the extension's logic and functionality. Developers can use the Checkout UI extensions API documentation to find alternative solutions.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may experience issues with checkout UI extensions that have not been updated to remove the deprecated API. They should encourage their developers to update the extensions as soon as possible to avoid any disruptions to their store's functionality.
insight.why_it_matters: The deprecation of the useBuyerJourneyIntercept API is important because it affects the functionality of checkout UI extensions, which are critical to the user experience and conversion rates of Shopify stores. Developers must update their extensions to ensure compatibility with future API versions.
insight.code_example: query { checkout { id } } mutation { checkoutComplete { checkout { id } } }

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.1
updates.summary: Hydrogen CLI has been updated to read disabled command metadata and preserve actionable build errors during deployment.

updates.title: @shopify/create-hydrogen@5.0.38
updates.summary: Create Hydrogen now adds an explicit app alias to new projects, improving JavaScript project configuration.

updates.title: skeleton@2026.4.5
updates.summary: Hydrogen skeleton has been updated to include an explicit app alias in new projects, similar to create Hydrogen.
Shopify CLI version 4.5.0 has been released, including changes to store commands and other improvements.

updates.title: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
updates.summary: POS Extensions now support a background extension target, allowing for event observation and background logic without rendering UI.

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners has been introduced, aiming to increase trust within the ecosystem.

updates.title: App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events
updates.summary: App Pricing has been updated with more plans, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events.

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: POS UI extensions API version 2026-07 now requires per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now handles breaking changes to Action extensions more gracefully, reducing validation failures.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now automatically updates Action runtime URLs on every execution, simplifying app redeployment.
Shopify CLI version 4.4.0 has been released, including updates to Javy dependencies and GCS bundle upload validation.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: Updated App Store Requirements emphasize honest and transparent review practices for all published apps.

recap.headline: Hydrogen and Shopify ecosystem updates with new features and bug fixes

themes.title: Hydrogen Updates
themes.detail: Hydrogen received several updates, including @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.1, @shopify/create-hydrogen@5.0.38, and skeleton@2026.4.5, which fixed bugs and added new features such as explicit ~ app alias to new Hydrogen projects.

themes.title: Shopify Ecosystem Updates
themes.detail: The Shopify ecosystem saw several updates, including the release of CLI 4.5.0, POS Extensions supporting background extension targets, and changes to App Pricing, POS UI extensions, and Shopify Flow, which aim to improve the overall developer experience and provide more flexibility and control.

actions.text: Update Hydrogen projects to use the latest version of @shopify/cli-hydrogen and @shopify/create-hydrogen
Review and adapt to the changes in App Pricing, POS UI extensions, and Shopify Flow
Test and implement the new background extension target for POS Extensions
